title: Creative Agency wanting to refresh platform and integrate Pageproof
excerpt: Creative Marketing agency has been using Monday for over a year.  We want to update our boards and make better use of the platform.  We are also going to be integrating PageProof and are looking for someone who is famili…

posts.author: JenniferAtwood (Harley0923***)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creative Marketing agency has been using Monday for over a year. We want to update our boards and make better use of the platform. We are also going to be integrating PageProof and are looking for someone who is familiar with this. We need several automations setup with linked boards to make ourselves more efficient. We do need this done in a short time frame.

Must have worked with marketing/ad agency
A bonus if you have worked with PageProof

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Harley,

I’ve worked with multiple marketing agencies, some specialized on advertising, others on UCG & creativity.

Although I haven’t worked with Pageproof yet, I did work with similar tools like https://frame.io/.

Feel free to learn more about me on my LinkedIn profile or schedule a discovery call here.

Greetings,

Patrick

posts.cookedHtml:
